mystery_cues.text: Something in the tall grass is waiting to be noticed.
mystery_cues.unlock_hint: Try logging an insect or a wildflower out in the open.

mystery_cues.text: Shadows shift between the trees, just out of sight.
mystery_cues.unlock_hint: A tree, a perching bird, or a deer track will fill this in.

mystery_cues.text: Faint ripples cross the still water, but no shape yet.
mystery_cues.unlock_hint: Look for a frog, a fish, or a heron near the edge.

mystery_cues.text: Empty blue overhead, with room for wings to arrive.
mystery_cues.unlock_hint: A bird in the air will wake this zone.

mystery_cues.text: Quiet ground hides life you cannot see yet.
mystery_cues.unlock_hint: Mushrooms, worms, or a beetle under a log all count here.

mystery_cues.text: Sidewalk life waits to be noticed between the buildings.
mystery_cues.unlock_hint: Edge-living birds, plants in cracks, or small mammals count here.

mystery_cues.text: A blank corner is set aside for finds that do not fit elsewhere.
mystery_cues.unlock_hint: Anything unusual or hard to place lands here.
